strategy: Low-health duo. Claudas Steal-Heals from his partner Brulee Sucre whenever he is attacked, so he sustains off Brulee. Kill Brulee first or AoE both down together.
Blade and burst; at 1030 health one good hit ends Claudas once Brulee cannot feed him.
cheatNotes: Attacking Claudas makes him Steal Health from Brulee Sucre to heal, so kill Brulee first or AoE both so he cannot sustain.
